commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: This submission is incomplete and severely misaligned with the brief. The code contains multiple files (types, constants, hooks, components) but the weather card component is fragmented across several files with the critical ForecastStrip component entirely unimplemented. While CurrentWeather exists and attempts to use design tokens, it still includes hardcoded inline styles (fontSize: '4rem', textTransform), lacks responsive design, and the 5-day forecast strip—the main requirement—is missing entirely. The codebase also shows significant organizational confusion with incorrect imports and file structure.
